{{Quote|Heavy losses sustained in the ongoing assault of U'Dray have put us understrength. We are receiving a replacement complement of new TIE pilots from the training squadron of the ''Victorious''.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]], in a [[datamemo]] to the [[Scimitar assault wing]]'s [[Squadron Leader/Legends|squadron leaders]]|<ref name="ISB" />}}
The '''assault of U'Dray''' took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
It was a relatively extensive series of operations, in which the [[Scimitar assault wing]] was sent against [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] positions at [[U'Dray]]. The series of missions took its toll on the [[TIE pilot|pilots]] of the wing's [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], necessitating their replacement with [[Unidentified training squadron|trainee pilots]] fresh from the [[Victorious (capital ship)|''Victorious'']], who had never flown bombers before.<ref name="ISB" />
